title: greenea corymbosa var. longicalyx
intro: Greenea corymbosa var. longicalyx, also known as the Thai mountain greenea, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Greenea corymbosa var. longicalyx have been used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe wounds and infections. The plant is also valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Greenea corymbosa var. longicalyx is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its therapeutic properties and promote overall well-being.
